languages.text: "Всегда теперь за ваше здоровье молиться буду, покуда не помру!"

traits.locale_text: "Всегда теперь за ваше здоровье молиться буду, покуда не помру!"

languages.text: "From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"
languages.original_text: "Всегда теперь за ваше здоровье молиться буду, покуда не помру!"

traits.locale_text: "From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"
"From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"
"From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"

languages.text: 「これから、死ぬ日まで、君の健康を祈る！」
languages.original_text: "From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"

languages.text: "Bundan böyle ölene dek sağlığınız için dua edeceğim!"
languages.original_text: "From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"

traits.locale_text: "Bundan böyle ölene dek sağlığınız için dua edeceğim!"

languages.text: “从今往后，我要日日为您祈福，直到我咽气那天！”
languages.original_text: "From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"

traits.locale_text: “从今往后，我要日日为您祈福，直到我咽气那天！”

languages.text: "Ab heute werde ich für Euch beten, solange ich lebe!"
languages.original_text: "From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"

traits.locale_text: "Ab heute werde ich für Euch beten, solange ich lebe!"

languages.text: « À partir de maintenant, je ne cesserai jamais de prier pour votre santé, et ce, jusqu'à ma mort ! »
languages.original_text: "From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"

traits.locale_text: « À partir de maintenant, je ne cesserai jamais de prier pour votre santé, et ce, jusqu'à ma mort ! »

languages.text: «De ahora en adelante, ¡rezaré por su salud hasta que llegue mi hora!».
languages.original_text: "From now on, I'll always pray for your health, until the day I die!"

traits.locale_text: «De ahora en adelante, ¡rezaré por su salud hasta que llegue mi hora!».
